baseline_definition: iTransformer backbone with Active_Pow extracted from the multivariate forecast output.

validation_metrics.mape_note: MAPE excludes targets with abs(y_true) <= 1e-6 to avoid night-time zero division.
validation_metrics.normalization_note: nmae_by_mean/nrmse_by_mean/nmbe_by_mean use mean(abs(y_true)) as denominator. nmae_by_max/nrmse_by_max/nmbe_by_max use max(abs(y_true)) in the evaluated split/scope as a PV capacity proxy.

reported_metrics.mape_note: MAPE excludes targets with abs(y_true) <= 1e-6 to avoid night-time zero division.
reported_metrics.normalization_note: nmae_by_mean/nrmse_by_mean/nmbe_by_mean use mean(abs(y_true)) as denominator. nmae_by_max/nrmse_by_max/nmbe_by_max use max(abs(y_true)) in the evaluated split/scope as a PV capacity proxy.

test_metrics.mape_note: MAPE excludes targets with abs(y_true) <= 1e-6 to avoid night-time zero division.
test_metrics.normalization_note: nmae_by_mean/nrmse_by_mean/nmbe_by_mean use mean(abs(y_true)) as denominator. nmae_by_max/nrmse_by_max/nmbe_by_max use max(abs(y_true)) in the evaluated split/scope as a PV capacity proxy.
